zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke於大約1228年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可時，她的父親Thomas de Greystoke40歲，母親Christian Veteripont35歲。她於1264年與Roger de Lascelles在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年5月在英國越可爾吉可比 華阿費享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke于大约1228年出生在英国英格兰波藍德格斯托可时，她的父亲Thomas de Greystoke40岁，母亲Christian Veteripont35岁。她于1264年与Roger de Lascelles在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年5月在英国越可爾吉可比 華阿費享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke was born about 1228, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Greystoke, was 40 and her mother, Christian Veteripont, was 35. She married Roger de Lascelles in 1264, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in May 1323, in Kirkby Wharfe, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke est née environ 1228, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Greystoke, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Christian Veteripont, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Lascelles en 1264, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en mai 1323, à Kirkby Wharfe, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 96 ans.

Sie hat 1264 in Yorkshire, England Roger de Lascelles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Mai 1323 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Kirkby Wharfe, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzThomas Greystokeが約1228年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで生まれた時，父Thomas de Greystokeは40歳，母Christian Veteripontは35歳であった。1264年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRoger de Lascellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年5月にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルクビー ウアルフで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke(이)가 대략 1228년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Greystoke(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Veteripont(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1264년 영국 요르크실르에서 Roger de Lascelles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 5월 영국 요르크실르 커k비 화아르프에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke nasceu aproximadamente 1228, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Greystoke, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Christian Veteripont, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Lascelles em 1264, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em maio de 1323, em Kirkby Wharfe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke родилась около 1228 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Greystoke было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Veteripont, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Lascelles в 1264 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла май 1323 г. в местности киркби уарф, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 96 лет.
